what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-99bf1499, of type board_items, to the board item item-7f8e00cf in the dragnet-development channel, and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-7f8e00cf
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
The id in the frontmatter matches the filename
standouts: References a board item using a board:// URI scheme
conventions: Uses a board:// URI to identify the target
notes: A metadata stub linking attachment att-99bf1499 to board item item-7f8e00cf in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or items are associated with board://item-7f8e00cf?
Is the attachment expected to have a body beyond the frontmatter?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content: it records a typed link to a board item and an addition timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, queryable record that a board-item attachment belongs to a specific channel and target board item.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment and a specific board item, supporting traceability from attachments to board content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items that links attachment att-99bf1499 to board item item-7f8e00cf in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that attachment att-99bf1499 is associated with board item item-7f8e00cf in the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
